name: @nebutra/access-gate
description: Cold-start invite gate infrastructure for controlled SaaS access

gaps: Better Auth sign-up preflight and post-signup redemption are wired in apps/web
Admin issue API/UI and email delivery are wired in apps/web
Dub short-link creation is wired in apps/web when DUB_API_KEY is configured
nebutra.summary: Provider-agnostic invite-code gate for cold-start access control
